name: checkboxes-impl
description: A real-time collaborative checkbox grid supporting 1 million checkboxes (scalable to 1 billion) using SpacetimeDB 0.1 backend and vanilla WASM frontend.

scripts.test: echo 'Run specific tests from typescript-frontend directory:' && echo '  npm run test:unit    # Unit tests (Vitest)' && echo '  npm run test:e2e     # E2E tests (Playwright)' && echo '  npm run test:full    # Complete test suite'
